lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: HEY PETE, WHAT ARE YOU DOING HERE?

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Shhhh! It's a library you know!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, sorry! So, what's new?

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Not much, just doing some research on Dwarvern Culture. Did you know that Keldagrim was originally constructed by a long lost clan who embraced the power of magic, and used it to aid with glorious buildings like

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: the royal palace?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Really??

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Yes. They even stayed down there for 1000 years or more, in a time they call 'The age of Kings'.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: WOW!

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Shhhh! That's enough history for one day I think!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Pete, what are you doing out here in the deep wilderness?

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Shhh!! Don't let the others see me here! I'm on a top secret mission for the Burth..., no, nothing. Never mind. Oooo, look, the chaos elemental!! Quick, run!!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Argh!! Where?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey Postie. Hows tricks? Who are you interviewing here?

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Everyone deserves a hic break you know. It gets pretty tiring lugging burp letters about all day.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. Can I join you?

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Why, am I hic coming apart?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You've been here a while, haven't you?

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Maybe I haves, maybe I haves. It all goes straight to my head you see.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes... I can see that. Bye Pete!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey Pete what you doing here?

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Just doing a quick survey on famous people and their favourite colour. It's a special feature for 'West Wyverns Women's Weekly'.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I get a copy?

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Can you speak Wyvern?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No. Can you?

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Well obviously.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Go on then.

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Here! Are you mad? No, 'fraid I can't do that. Could cause all sorts of trouble.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're a bit mad really aren't you?

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: So would you be if you could speak over 1000 languages. I bet it's bliss being ignorant of this world's trouble! I'm off!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi Pete, how's things?

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Just chatting to my big brother Pete. Hee heee!!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's so funny?

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Just a joke that he told me. Care to hear it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, go on then.

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: 2 Parrots sit on a perch. One says to the other 'Can you smell fish'? Hee heheee he ho ho.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And so what did the other one say?

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Sigh. 2 Parrots sit on a perch. One says to the other 'Can you smell fish'? Hee heheee he ho ho.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. So... what did the other one say?

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: You're serious aren't you. Listen again. 2 Parrots sit on a perch. One says to the other 'Can you smell fish'.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fish, right. So, what was the reply?

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: ARGH!! 2 PARROTS. ON A PERCH. SMELLS FISHY.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, still lost. Is one of them a penguin?

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: You're doing it on purpose now aren't you? Please leave me alone!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey Pete, what you doing here?

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Just chatting to my brother Pete. He keeps Parrots.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Doesn't sound too tough. What's the pay like?

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Not very good I'm afraid. His bosses are pretty cheep.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Groan. Don't give up the day job Pete.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey Pete what you doing here?

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Arrrr. Avast shipmate. Arrr. I Likes the cut of your gibb. Arrr. That it be.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Arrr?

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Arrrr.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a strange feeling of Deja Vu. I must go now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey Postie! What you doing all the way up here?

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: I was just trying to get some wise words of wisdom from the Oracle. You know, she's been here a long, long time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I thought as much. What did she have to say?

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: First she said 'I am the Oracle, And when I open my lips, let no dog bark!'

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. And then what?

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: I didn't know she was familiar with the works of Shakespeare. So I said 'Et tu, brute?'

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And then?

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Well, she started leaping about and pointing to Ardougne, shouting something about betrayal. She was really angry.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Cripes! What do you think it means?

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Who knows. Always cryptic to the last. See you around.

sections.title: Upon spawning in at a new location

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Anyone got post?

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Reldo, have you found that book I was looking for yet?

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: No, not yet... but I know I have seen it somewhere...

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: ... come back later.

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Sure, no problems. See you later.

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: Bye! Say hi to the other Petes for me.

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Will do. Farewell!

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Psssst! How is the plan going?

lines.speaker: Noterazzo
lines.text: Perfectly. Everyone is prepared.

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Great. Now don't forget - nobody does anything until I give the word! OK?

lines.speaker: Noterazzo
lines.text: Sure no problem. We'll be waiting.

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: 'Till next time. Farewell.

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: 4 Pints of your finest please.

lines.speaker: Barmaid
lines.text: 4 Pints coming right up. Are you expecting guests?

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Just a few old friends.

lines.speaker: Barmaid
lines.text: You want me to put it on your tab?

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: That would be great, thanks. Oh cripes! I've left a fire burning! I'll be back in a mo.

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Fight! Fight!.. Fight!!

lines.speaker: Lanthus
lines.text: Easy Pete, calm down. Don't lose your head!

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Cheeky!! If you're not careful I'll get you cursed too!

lines.speaker: Lanthus
lines.text: You wouldn't catch me double-crossing a witch!

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: But which witch is which! Anyway, I'm late for an appointment with the oracle.

lines.speaker: Lanthus
lines.text: Take care and say hi to the kids for me.

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Hey, bro! How's the party business?

lines.speaker: Party Pete
lines.text: Great, thanks!

lines.speaker: Party Pete
lines.text: Celebrating weddings and drop partys...

lines.speaker: Party Pete
lines.text: ...and getting paid for it!

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Nice. Well, I'm here to talk to some White Knights.

lines.speaker: Party Pete
lines.text: Want to take some cake with you?

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: No thanks, I'm still dieting!

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Just seafood for me.

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Hi Pete!

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Mum wants to know if you're coming round for tea.

lines.speaker: Parroty Pete
lines.text: No, I've got another late night here.

lines.speaker: Parroty  Pete
lines.text: Ol' bluebeak's got the flu again!

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Oh dear. Nothing too serious I hope.

lines.speaker: Parroty  Pete
lines.text: Well, as long as he hasn't caught anything from that evil chicken.

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Got a taste for parrots now too has he?

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: *Sigh.* Will nothing sacred be safe?

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Hey Pete. Any news from the fleet?

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: No yo ho bruv.

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: 'Tis all quiet on the eastern front.

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Good good.

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Well, you know what to do if something goes wrong.

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Aye, that I do bruv.

lines.speaker: Pirate Pete
lines.text: Holler like a bosun without a bottle.

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: That's it brother, and we'll come a running!

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Well, I'm back. And he said no. Again.

lines.speaker: Oracle
lines.text: Lemons? Both of them?

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Lemons? What are you talking about?

lines.speaker: Oracle
lines.text: Fragile! Do not bend!

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: I swear you get stranger every time.

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Ok, I'll ask again.

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: I'd better head off.

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Now, how's this thing work again...?

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Hello [player name]. I've got a message for you from Molly. She needs your help urgently. Will you assist her now?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure, anything for Molly.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell her to get stuffed.

sections.title: If Postie Pete is interested in another player

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Sorry, I don't have any messages for you.

sections.title: If the player is in a zone where the random event isn't allowed

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Message for you, [player name]!

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Hello, [player name]?

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Urgent message for you, [player name]?

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Someone needs your help, [player name]!

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Will you accept the message, [player name]?

lines.speaker: Postie Pete
lines.text: Maybe later.
